dimensions.label: Correct topic resolved
dimensions.criteria: Intent maps to exactly one of the 16 enum values via a routes.json trigger or a SKILL.md tie-breaker; rationale is tagged.

dimensions.label: Single playbook read
dimensions.criteria: Exactly one references/<topic>.md was opened this invocation; no compare-reads.

dimensions.label: Tie-break discipline
dimensions.criteria: When two routes could match, the loser was rejected with rationale, or one disambiguating question was asked; no silent default.

dimensions.label: Depth path honored
dimensions.criteria: quick ran essentials only; deep ran the exhaustive path with verification and script evidence.

dimensions.label: Playbook acceptance gate
dimensions.criteria: The route's own rubric/criteria passed, including constitution v6.0.0 enforcement.

dimensions.label: Evidence tags present
dimensions.criteria: Every non-obvious claim carries one Alfa-set tag ([DOC]/[INFERENCE]/[ASSUMPTION]); preserved [EXPLICIT]/[INFERRED] allowed; no foreign taxonomy.

dimensions.label: Governance invariants
dimensions.criteria: Single-brand output, no invented prices, no green-as-success, no client PII.

pass_threshold: All dimensions >= 1 and topic_resolution, single_load, playbook_gate == 2
